bead.title: docs: strip Houdini references from cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md after Option B migration
bead.description:
Final gate opus review of ddx-02d6142d (2026-04-15) noted cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md:15 still references 'bun run houdini:generate' as a dev command. Houdini was replaced with graphql-request + graphql-ws in commit 03cc694 (Option B). The docs are stale.

Fix: strip the houdini:generate line from CLAUDE.md (and grep for any other Houdini mentions in docs/).
bead.acceptance: (1) grep -r 'houdini' docs/ cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md returns nothing. (2) The SvelteKit dev commands section in CLAUDE.md describes the actual Option B tooling.
